ddls:
CREATE TABLE "latches" (
  "latch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latch */,
  "latch_name" TEXT /* Name of the latch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the latch */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the latch (e.g., memory, disk, network) */,
  "get_requests" TEXT /* Number of get requests for the latch */,
  "misses" TEXT /* Number of misses for the latch */,
  "sleeps" TEXT /* Number of sleeps for the latch */,
  "spin_gets" TEXT /* Number of spin gets for the latch */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the latch data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "latch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latch */,
  "get_requests" TEXT /* Number of get requests for the latch at the given timestamp */,
  "misses" TEXT /* Number of misses for the latch at the given timestamp */,
  "sleeps" TEXT /* Number of sleeps for the latch at the given timestamp */,
  "spin_gets" TEXT /* Number of spin gets for the latch at the given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical data entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional information about the historical entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the historical entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latch_history_latch_id FOREIGN KEY ("latch_id") REFERENCES latches ("latch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latch_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "latch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latch */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration setting (e.g., timeout, spin count) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latch_configurations_latch_id FOREIGN KEY ("latch_id") REFERENCES latches ("latch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latch_config_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical configuration entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration setting */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting at the given timestamp */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting at the given timestamp */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting at the given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical configuration entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional information about the historical configuration entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the historical configuration entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latch_config_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES latch_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., DBA, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., latch, configuration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., latch, configuration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "latch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latch */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high_misses, high_sleeps) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  "alerted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_latch_id FOREIGN KEY ("latch_id") REFERENCES latches ("latch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken to resolve the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Additional information about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
